meaning: n.变形,变态,变质,变质作用
examples: Put your love in the fridge, just to it not so fast metamorphism.

The process of alternating solid rock masses is called metamorphism.
This is a key piece of evidence which the researchers rely on to show that the tubules are much older than the metamorphism which transformed the Archaean rock.
